mission_summary: Sample escalation packet for a TSF foreground mission lifecycle result. This is schema evidence only and does not call an API.

verifier_result.summary: Verifier not run because preflight did not approve the mission.

blocker_register.summary: Mission requested a restricted action without a matching active approval ledger entry.

exact_decision_requested: Decide whether this mission should stop for exact Tim approval or be repacketized.
